reviews.author: MUSKAN CHAUHAN
reviews.review_body: Great school for kids... Amazing teachers and Principal Ma'am, Sports facilities are the best in Faridabad with an amazing auditorium for co-curricular activities and events.

reviews.author: Aarav Jain
reviews.review_body:
Good experience in this school where the
children get motivated and confident
This is school where all children get progress in all activities  This is best school

reviews.author: Subhash
reviews.review_body: Bus service is very bad in all seasons, classes are also not well maintained,maids don't do work properly

reviews.author: Babu Goel
reviews.review_body: The school is excellent. It makes the children's best in everything,like,general knowledge,academic,sports.

reviews.author: Rudra Goel
reviews.review_body:
games was excellent acadimacally
It was nice. Since,I am studying from play school in this school I didn,t get any problem

reviews.author: Diksha Sharma
reviews.review_body: Very nice campus and excellent way of teaching.

reviews.author: Manjeet Kumar
reviews.review_body: As a parent according to me modern school is with best academic facilties, awesome teacher and coordinator and sports facilities. My two child studies in the school since 1st and KG. I appreciate the Hard work of teachers,other staff and respected co-ordinators.

reviews.author: Vihaan Jain
reviews.review_body:
I am a student here for the last four years.
All teachers are helpful .
They have a very good facilities of sports .
Like swimming pool, basketball ground,volleyball ground, train for kids, etc.
It is one of the best school in faridabad ❤️

reviews.author: Ritesh Samal
reviews.review_body: I am Ritesh of class 8th and i think that our school is the best school in our whole state .It has many facilities for children like swimming pool,a big play ground,large classes ,smart classes,basket ball court,volley ball court,table tennis court,special train for children and many more.Its teachers are very good and interactive also.

reviews.author: Meenakshi Verma
reviews.review_body: I am very delightful to give my review for this school as i have 2 kids Chirag(10th)and Kavya(6th) and both are studying in this school from pre nursery.I am very happy that both my kids got good guidance under the good teachers The staff is very helpful always Teachers are always available for our kids to help them in their studies.
